title: Anyone have any info about Evangelion models

wikitext: []: Anyone have any info about Evangelion models?             Quote Post by SAWgunner » Fri Sep 30, 2011 3:03 am Lately, I've had a desire to build some Eva model kits from Bandai and I was wondering if anyone knew if the kits were any good. I'm looking for things like poseability, quality of the mold, ease of assembly, etc. All the normal stuff one looks for in a good kit.

[]: Anyone have any info about Evangelion models?             Quote Post by SAWgunner » Fri Sep 30, 2011 3:03 am Lately, I've had a desire to build some Eva model kits from Bandai and I was wondering if anyone knew if the kits were any good. I'm looking for things like poseability, quality of the mold, ease of assembly, etc. All the normal stuff one looks for in a good kit.
